description: CompositionBlack jacket made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has long sleeves with elasticated cuffs, mock neck with zippered placket, white panels on the left side, vented seam on upper back, printed logo on the upper left chest and upper back, mesh lining and toggle straps on the hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryEnjoy the winter in style in this Dri-fit jacket from nike. The simple style is complemented by the bold white panelling on the sides, while the fabric wicks sweat away and keeps you dry and comfortable all day. Team this with long sleeved tees, jeans or tracks and sports shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 33"
